title: thesium brevifolium
intro: Thesium brevifolium, also known as short-leaved thyme, is a low-growing, perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation and promoting the removal of mucus, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Thesium brevifolium can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
